about.title: About Us
about.subtitle: We connect you with the best KTV venues — fast, reliable reservations and great deals.
about.missionText: To make booking the perfect night out effortless. We partner with verified KTV venues to deliver curated experiences and exclusive promotions.
about.valuesText: Customer-first, trustworthy partnerships, and continuous improvement.

booking.title: Reserve your table
booking.subtitle: Fast booking, confirmed instantly. Choose any available table below.
booking.howTo1: Pick an available table and click Reserve.
booking.howTo2: Provide your name, guests and choose date/time.
booking.howTo3: Confirm booking — you'll see a notification.
booking.errorFill: Please fill in name and date/time
